allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ItemProperty ''HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\VisualStudio\\14.0\\VC\\Runtimes\\x64'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Version; Get-ItemProperty ''HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\WOW6432Node\\Microsoft\\VisualStudio\\14.0\\VC\\Runtimes\\x64'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Version")

Bash(powershell -Command "& { $out = Join-Path $env:TEMP ''vc_redist.x64.exe''; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vc_redist.x64.exe'' -OutFile $out -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host ''Downloaded to'' $out; Start-Process $out -ArgumentList ''/install'',''/quiet'',''/norestart'' -Wait -Verb RunAs; Write-Host ''Install complete'' }")
